runway_notes.12:
RWY 12 - grass, left-hand pattern (inference, pattern south away from Fehraltorf and Russikon).
Elev 1758 ft; pattern altitude 2758 ft (1000 ft AGL), round to 2800 ft.
Speck Info 120.350.
CRITICAL: directly under LSZH TMA Sector East, floor approximately 4500 ft - height constraint strict.

metadata.source: X-Plane apt.dat (ARP, runway thresholds, Speck Info frequency); Wikipedia DE for elevation and runway dimensions; VRPs are plausibility-based topographic inferences
metadata.verified_by: thWelly + plugin-author research; VRPs and pattern direction are plausibility-based - needs verification against current Skyguide VAC before flight
metadata.notes: ARP 47.3764 N / 8.7575 E and runway 12/30 grass 625 m x 18 m taken from apt.dat and Wikipedia. VRPs N/E/S/W placed approximately 2-3 NM from ARP toward Wila, Pfaeffikersee, Hinwil and Lindau respectively - they are NOT the published Skyguide VAC points (LSZK published reporting points likely include PFAEFFIKERSEE, WIL, BAERETSWIL based on the regional pattern). Pattern direction (12=left, 30=right) inferred to keep pattern south, away from Fehraltorf (north) and Russikon (west). Speck Info 120.350 confirmed by apt.dat row 1054. Operator: Flugsportgruppe Zuercher Oberland (FGZO).
